context: Tests whether the Core Data skill preserves the SwiftData coexistence and migration boundary.

checklist.name: SwiftData route
checklist.description: States that Core Data plus SwiftData coexistence or migration should use the swiftdata skill.

checklist.name: No overreach
checklist.description: Avoids turning the answer into a full SwiftData migration guide.

checklist.name: Store alignment
checklist.description: Gives high-level guidance about matching the existing store URL and schema.

checklist.name: Model alignment
checklist.description: Mentions matching entity and property names or using rename mapping such as @Attribute(originalName:).

checklist.name: Standalone Core Data scope
checklist.description: Preserves standalone Core Data as the right scope for apps that have not adopted SwiftData.
